title: Issue Log
disclaimer: Synth is not legal advice or financial advice. It is a document review aid. Consult a qualified professional before making decisions.

issues.title: Uncapped Liability Exposure
evidenceQuotes: In no event shall either party's aggregate liability exceed the amounts paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim
issues.recommendation: Negotiate a higher liability cap or mutual limitation. Review indemnification scope with counsel.

issues.title: Auto-Renewal Without Notice Obligation
evidenceQuotes: This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one-year terms unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least 30 days prior
issues.recommendation: Add calendar reminder 60 days before renewal. Negotiate mutual 30-day notice requirement or opt-out window.

issues.title: Overdue Payment: Acme Corp ($12,500.00)
issues.recommendation: Resolve overdue payment of $12,500.00 to Acme Corp. Due: 2025-01-15.

issues.title: Overdue Payment: Global Supplies Ltd ($8,750.00)
affectedRows: Vendor: Global Supplies Ltd | Amount: $8,750.00 | Due: 2025-02-01
issues.recommendation: Resolve overdue payment of $8,750.00 to Global Supplies Ltd. Due: 2025-02-01.

issues.title: Preferred Stock in Term Sheet Not Reflected in Cap Table
evidenceQuotes: Preferred stock / liquidation preference terms present vs. Cap table may not reflect post-closing terms
issues.recommendation: Reconcile cap table with term sheet preferred stock terms after closing.

issues.title: Broad IP Assignment Without Carveout
evidenceQuotes: Contractor assigns to Company all right, title, and interest in and to all Work Product
issues.recommendation: Negotiate a carveout for pre-existing IP or work performed outside contract scope.

issues.title: Repeated Vendor Names in Payment Schedule
issues.recommendation: Verify these are separate invoices and not duplicate billing entries.

issues.title: Data Quality: Blank cells detected in required columns
affectedRows: Blank cells detected in required columns
issues.recommendation: Review spreadsheet data for completeness and accuracy.
